note: 跨论文共享数据集地址单一真源。本地 + HPC 路径、下载源、用途、状态都在此。任何脚本/config 引用数据集前先查此表，不重复硬编码、不臆想路径。新增数据集或换路径只改这里 + 在引用处指向。状态: ready=就位可用 / partial=部分就位 / todo=待下载。

hosts.hpc: XJTLU HPC (gpu4090, 4 卡 qos) — 见 project/HPC_WORKFLOW.md / memory project_hpc_xjtlu

hippocampus_msd.name: MSD Task04 Hippocampus
hippocampus_msd.purpose: NCA-PhaseMap 主数据：Med-NCA 复现 + update 稀疏度功能塌缩相边界 killshot (C044/C044b/C044c)；r1_hippocampus epoch_300 ckpt 在 MEDNCA_ROOT/checkpoints

isic2020.name: ISIC 2020
isic2020.hpc: TODO 未确认 HPC 路径
isic2020.purpose: 主训练集；ITB-LQ/HQ/Edge 降质子集源 (results/itb_subsets.csv)

fitzpatrick17k.name: FitzPatrick17k
fitzpatrick17k.purpose: 肤型公平性 (I-VI) + 训练补充；ITB-Diverse 1500 源；L10 全量 fairness (n=16012 带肤型)

ham10000.name: HAM10000
ham10000.purpose: zero-shot 跨数据集 (iclr: results/external_ham10000_predictions.csv) + medad-failmap T6 跨集外推 B0 训 AE on NV(6705 图) (anomaly_scores_isic_ae.csv); 图分 HAM10000_images_part_1/part_2 两目录, dx==nv 过滤
ham10000.lesion_mask: data/external/ham10000/HAM10000_segmentations_lesion_tschandl/ (官方 GT lesion mask 10016 张 ISIC_<id>_segmentation.png, Tschandl 单医师 FIJI, Dataverse fileId 3838943; Phase1 真 mask 算同口径 size/contrast 用)

chexpert.name: CheXpert
chexpert.purpose: cross-modality 跨域 (chest X-ray); 脚本 scripts/eval_chexray_crossdomain.py 就位待跑

aptos2019.name: APTOS 2019 Blindness (fundus)
aptos2019.purpose: cross-modality 跨域 (diabetic retinopathy); 脚本 scripts/eval_fundus_crossdomain.py

kvasir.name: Kvasir-endoscopy
kvasir.purpose: cross-modality 跨域 (endoscopy); M2 待下载

isic2024.name: ISIC 2024 SLICE-3D
isic2024.purpose: L24 real LQ smartphone-style 子集挖掘; M2 待下载

nih_cxr14.name: NIH ChestX-ray14 (224² resized)
nih_cxr14.splits_hpc: /gpfs/work/bio/jiayu2403/nca-jepa/splits/ (pretrain_10k=10000图/3257患者, probe 1%/10%/100%, test=25596, 患者重叠0)
nih_cxr14.split: DATA_ROOT/splits/ (build_splits.py 生成; pilot 子集 10k)
nih_cxr14.purpose: NCA-JEPA pilot 预训练 + linear probe; 对齐 CheXWorld 224² 输入

medianomaly_bench.name: MedIAnomaly benchmark (7 集)
medianomaly_bench.subsets: RSNA(胸片) / VinDr-CXR(胸片) / BrainTumor(脑MRI) / LAG(眼底) / Camelyon16(病理,有像素mask) / BraTS2021(脑MRI FLAIR,有像素mask) / ISIC2018-Task3(皮镜,nevus=正常)
medianomaly_bench.local: BraTS2021 已下: project/meeting/MedAD-FailMap/data/BraTS2021/ (train 4211 / test normal 828 / tumor 1948 / annotation 1948，计数对齐官方✅)；其余 6 集待按需下
medianomaly_bench.source: Zenodo 分集 tar.gz: https://zenodo.org/api/records/12677223/files/<NAME>.tar.gz/content (BraTS2021 70MB / BrainTumor 42MB / LAG 202MB / RSNA 568MB / VinCXR 620MB / Camelyon16 891MB；注意是分集非单 zip)；codebase github.com/caiyu6666/MedIAnomaly。ISIC2018 不在此 Zenodo→本地 HAM10000 NV(6705图)零下载对接
medianomaly_bench.purpose: 重建式 AD 失败边界主 benchmark; 仅 BraTS2021/Camelyon16 支持像素级评估(协变量分层用 BraTS test/annotation mask); Phase 0 只用 BraTS2021。【fmreg 复用 BraTS2021 多序列(T1/T2/FLAIR)做同模态可变形配准主战场, 已 ready 免下】

vindrcxr_domainB.name: Domain-B CXR (vindrcxr)
vindrcxr_domainB.hpc: TODO: 填 HPC 部署路径
vindrcxr_domainB.source: Kaggle xhlulu/vinbigdata (VinBigData=VinDr-CXR 官方比赛数据, 512x512 PNG 镜像). 原始: physionet.org/content/vindr-cxr/1.0.0 (DICOM, 需凭证)
vindrcxr_domainB.purpose: NCA-JEPA 路线 B — 遗忘探针域 B 续训集（对齐域 A NIH 10k 规模）
vindrcxr_domainB.structure: train/<id>.png (15000) + test/<id>.png (3000); split 路径相对 local 根, 正斜杠
vindrcxr_domainB.note: NCA-JEPA 路线B遗忘探针域B. 纯SSL无标签(train_meta.csv未用). n_subset=10000采样=9000train+1000val

oasis.name: OASIS (brain MRI registration)
oasis.source: https://www.oasis-brains.org/ ; Learn2Reg 预处理版 https://learn2reg.grand-challenge.org/Datasets/ (OASIS-1 基, 160×224×192, 35 FreeSurfer 标签可算 Dice; 需 grand-challenge 账号)
oasis.purpose: FMReg 脑 MRI 可变形配准【正式 benchmark】; 中训 inter-subject 全量 + 35 标签算 Dice + neg_jac 折叠率。注: G5 killshot 实际用 BraTS2021 flair(非 OASIS, G6 卡/旧 Entry 措辞误写已订正)

ixi.name: IXI (brain MRI registration, junyuchen 预处理版)
ixi.source: https://github.com/junyuchen245/Preprocessed_IXI_Dataset (GDrive 1.44GB, 160×192×224 .pkl, 含 atlas + 皮层下 FreeSurfer 分割标签, 免注册); 原始 http://brain-development.org/ixi-dataset/
ixi.purpose: FMReg 脑配准【Gate1 快速 pilot 首选】(免注册 1.44GB 最快上手); TransMorph 标准集, 与 OASIS 互补

abdomenmrct.name: Learn2Reg AbdomenMRCT (跨模态 MRI-CT 腹部配准)
abdomenmrct.source: https://learn2reg.grand-challenge.org/Datasets/ (L2R'21 Task1; MRI→CT 腹部, 器官分割标签; 需 grand-challenge 账号)
abdomenmrct.purpose: FMReg 跨模态 L4 lever【首选】; FM-based MR-CT 生成式配准是真空地(FlowReg/对手全无跨模态)

dirlab.name: Dir-Lab 4DCT (肺呼吸配准, TRE benchmark)
dirlab.source: https://www.dir-lab.com/ (4D-CT 10例, inhale/exhale 300 手工 landmark/对, 1.0×1.0×2.5mm; 公开免费, 官网可达性中训前确认)
dirlab.purpose: FMReg 肺配准【TRE 金标准 benchmark】; FM 少步配准在肺 4DCT 是真空地

learn2reg.name: Learn2Reg benchmark
learn2reg.source: https://learn2reg.grand-challenge.org/ (多任务: OASIS脑/AbdomenCT-CT/AbdomenMRCT跨模态/肺CT/LUMIR脑/ReMIND超声-MRI; 公开 leaderboard + 官方 baseline; 指标 TRE/Dice/DSC30/HD95/%|J|≤0/SDlogJ 几何均值排名)
learn2reg.purpose: FMReg 多任务配准框架来源; 子集 oasis/abdomenmrct 已单列; leaderboard 对照 VoxelMorph/TransMorph/LapIRN/uniGradICON
